title: Mythical Arsenals
description: A plugin that adds 5 custom mythic items to your server, each with its own unique abilities, crafting recipes, and ritual-based mechanics.
body:
[DISCORD](https://discord.gg/7yurBtecrf)

🗡️Mythical Arsenals

Upgrade your server with legendary weapons that evolve through combat.

Eclipse Mythics introduces 5 custom weapons, each gaining power through kills, unlocking unique abilities and effects as you fight.

Perfect for PvP, RPG, and progression-based servers.

⚔️ MYTHICS
☄️ Skyfall

Harness the power of the heavens

Kills charge energy
Strike enemies with lightning
High stacks trigger meteor rain

Best for: AoE & kill streaks

🌌 Void Piercer

A blade from the abyss

Applies void corruption on hit
Kills grant short teleport (blink)
Higher stacks give invisibility bursts

Best for: mobility & stealth

🪓 Paladin’s Axe

Holy weapon of light

Heal on kill
Grants resistance & regen
High stacks activate holy shield

Best for: sustain & defense

👑 The Royal Purrisher

Power of royalty

Gain strength & speed on kills
Stack combo damage
Max stacks unleash phantom strikes

Best for: aggressive PvP

⚡ The Stormsplitter

Control the storm

Hits build electric charge
Kills release chain lightning
Max stacks create storm AoE zone

Best for: crowd control

🎮 FEATURES
Kill-based progression system
Unique abilities per weapon
Custom particles & effects
Fully configurable (damage, cooldowns, stacks)
Optimized for performance
📋 COMMANDS

Player:
/skyfall /voidpiercer /paladinaxe /purrisher /stormsplitter

Admin:
/mythics reload
/mythics give <weapon>
/mythics resetcooldowns

⚙️ CONFIG

Customize:

Damage & scaling
Kill requirements
Cooldowns
Effects & particles
🎯 PERFECT FOR

PvP • RPG • SMP • Progression servers

📦 REQUIREMENTS
Minecraft 1.21+
Spigot/Paper
